message:
refactor: rename fastmcp-macros crate to fastmcp-derive

Standardize procedural macro crate naming to follow Rust ecosystem
conventions where derive macros are typically in *-derive crates:

Documentation updates:
- AGENTS.md: Update crate tree to show fastmcp-derive
- README.md: Update crate listing and directory structure
- PROPOSED_RUST_ARCHITECTURE.md: Update architecture diagram references

Cargo configuration:
- Cargo.toml (workspace): Change dependency alias from fastmcp-macros
  to fastmcp-derive while keeping path to crates/fastmcp-macros/
- crates/fastmcp-macros/Cargo.toml: Update package name to fastmcp-derive
- crates/fastmcp/Cargo.toml: Update dependency reference
- Cargo.lock: Reflect package rename

Code updates:
- crates/fastmcp-macros/src/lib.rs: Update crate doc comment
- crates/fastmcp/src/lib.rs: Update extern crate and doc references

This is a purely cosmetic rename - the crate still lives in the
crates/fastmcp-macros directory but publishes as fastmcp-derive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ fastmcp_rust/
     ├── fastmcp-transport/             # Stdio, SSE transports
     ├── fastmcp-server/                # Server implementation
     ├── fastmcp-client/                # Client implementation
-    └── fastmcp-macros/                # #[tool], #[resource], #[prompt]
+    └── fastmcp-derive/                # #[tool], #[resource], #[prompt]
 ```
 
 ---

@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ fastmcp (facade)
   ├── fastmcp-transport (NDJSON + stdio transport)
   ├── fastmcp-server (builder, router, handlers, session)
   ├── fastmcp-client (stdio client + handshake)
-  ├── fastmcp-macros (#[tool], #[resource], #[prompt], JsonSchema)
+  ├── fastmcp-derive (#[tool], #[resource], #[prompt], JsonSchema)
   └── fastmcp-console (rich stderr output, stats, banner)
 ```
 
@@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ fastmcp (facade)
 - Call APIs for tools/resources/prompts
 - Progress notification handling for tool calls
 
-### `fastmcp-macros`
+### `fastmcp-derive`
 - `#[tool]`: converts a function into a `ToolHandler` impl
 - `#[resource]`: converts a function into a `ResourceHandler` impl
 - `#[prompt]`: converts a function into a `PromptHandler` impl

@@ -383,7 +383,7 @@ fastmcp_rust/
 │   ├── fastmcp-transport/ # Transport implementations (stdio, SSE, WebSocket)
 │   ├── fastmcp-server/    # Server builder, router, handlers
 │   ├── fastmcp-client/    # Client implementation
-│   └── fastmcp-macros/    # #[tool], #[resource], #[prompt] macros
+│   └── fastmcp-derive/    # #[tool], #[resource], #[prompt] macros
 ```
 
 | Crate | Purpose |
@@ -394,7 +394,7 @@ fastmcp_rust/
 | `fastmcp-transport` | Transport trait, stdio/SSE/WebSocket implementations |
 | `fastmcp-server` | `Server`, `ServerBuilder`, routing, handler traits |
 | `fastmcp-client` | `Client` for calling MCP servers |
-| `fastmcp-macros` | Procedural macros for handler generation |
+| `fastmcp-derive` | Procedural macros for handler generation |
 
 ---

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 [package]
-name = "fastmcp-macros"
+name = "fastmcp-derive"
 version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ description = "Procedural macros for FastMCP (#[tool], #[resource], #[prompt])"
 repository.workspace = true
 homepage.workspace = true
 readme.workspace = true
-documentation = "https://docs.rs/fastmcp-macros"
+documentation = "https://docs.rs/fastmcp-derive"
 keywords = ["mcp", "proc-macro", "macros", "json-schema", "handlers"]
 categories = ["development-tools::procedural-macro-helpers"]

@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ fastmcp-protocol.workspace = true
 fastmcp-transport.workspace = true
 fastmcp-server.workspace = true
 fastmcp-client.workspace = true
-fastmcp-macros.workspace = true
+fastmcp-derive.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
